overall.description: A smooth aerial drone-style traversal in Cyberpunk 2077, beginning inside a dark modern building, exiting onto a rooftop infinity pool with panoramic views of Night City's futuristic skyline, then approaching and entering a luxury glass residence perched above the city.

scene_state.functional_zone: luxury penthouse interior transitioning to rooftop

events.description: camera exits dark interior building through large doorway onto bright rooftop terrace
lighting shifts from dim artificial interior to bright natural sunlight

agents.ego_description: smoothly floating forward from interior darkness out onto the rooftop infinity pool deck

entered.detail: dark rectangular frame marking the transition from interior to exterior
reflective water surface with red accent panels along the edge
transparent glass barrier along the pool edge overlooking the city
futuristic high-rise buildings and towers of Night City in the distance

segments.scene_description: The segment begins inside a dark modern building, looking out through a large doorway. The camera moves forward, transitioning from the dim interior onto a bright rooftop terrace featuring an infinity pool. The glass railing and futuristic city skyline come into view as the camera exits the building.

scene_state.functional_zone: rooftop infinity pool with panoramic city views

events.description: camera begins slight pan to the right while continuing forward, revealing more of the cityscape

agents.ego_description: drifting across the rooftop pool surface while admiring the panoramic city views and distant mountains

entered.detail: tall building with illuminated 'sofixsys' signage on the facade
row of palm trees lining the right edge of the rooftop
hazy mountains visible on the horizon beyond the city

segments.scene_description: The camera drifts across the rooftop infinity pool under clear blue skies, with the futuristic city skyline stretching ahead. The sofixsys tower becomes visible on the left, while palm trees line the right side. Distant mountains appear on the horizon as the camera pans slightly, maintaining a smooth forward motion over the reflective water.

events.description: camera turns left and begins approaching the modern glass residence at the pool's edge
city skyline fades from view as camera focuses on the luxury building and arid hills

agents.ego_description: turning toward and approaching the modern glass residence while moving along the pool edge

entered.detail: luxury multi-level building with extensive glass walls and cantilevered sections
elevated highway structure winding through the lower part of the city
dry brown terrain rising behind the highway infrastructure

segments.scene_description: The camera turns left, shifting focus from the central city view toward a modern glass residence at the pool's edge. The sofixsys tower and main skyline fade from view, replaced by the approaching luxury building, highway viaducts, and arid hillsides. The camera continues drifting along the pool edge, getting closer to the residence entrance.

events.description: camera enters the interior of the modern glass residence through the main entrance
lighting shifts from bright natural sunlight to dimmer interior lighting

agents.ego_description: approaching the entrance and moving through the glass doors into the luxury residence lobby

entered.detail: bright red carpet leading from the pool deck into the building entrance
dark luxurious interior space with reflective floors and corporate logos on walls

segments.scene_description: The camera approaches the modern glass residence entrance, crossing a red carpet that leads from the pool deck into the building. Passing through the glass doors, the scene transitions from the bright exterior to a dimly lit luxurious interior lobby, with corporate logos visible on the walls and the reflective marble floor replacing the water surface.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from a dim interior to a sun-drenched rooftop before entering a luxury glass residence. It begins inside a dark modern building, moving forward through a large doorway to emerge onto a bright terrace featuring an infinity pool and a panoramic futuristic skyline. As the camera drifts across the reflective water under clear blue skies, the view expands to reveal the Sofixsys tower and distant mountains before turning left toward the pool's edge. The scene then shifts focus away from the central city toward a modern glass residence and arid hillsides, gliding along the deck toward the building's entrance. Finally, the camera crosses a red carpet and passes through glass doors, transitioning from the bright exterior into a dimly lit luxury lobby with reflective marble floors and corporate logos.
